rules.rule_text:
title: Data Exfiltration using Veiltransfer
id: 8c0ab44f-1178-4f41-a573-50a114724959
status: test
description: Detects veiltransfer execution even if the binary has had its name changed
references:
- https://github.com/infosecn1nja/VeilTransfer
author: NTT Security - Andreas Foureaux
date: 2025-07-28
tags:
- attack.exfiltration
logsource:
  product: endpoint
detection:
  selection_os_windows:
    eventcategory: process_creation
  selection_os_linux:
    src_os: linux
  selection_command:
    command|contains|all:
    - transfer
    - localPath
  selection_binary:
    image|endswith: veiltransfer.exe
  condition: 1 of selection_os* and (selection_command or selection_binary)
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
